title: Live-cell imaging of the plasma membrane of Jurkat T cells
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"demp6","text":"This is a protocol for the preparation of a Jurkat T cells for live imaging of the plasma membrane. This protocol was used to generate the data shown in Figure 6 of the following publication:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":153,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"b0cc8","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ee6bt","text":"Bruggeman et al., POLCAM: Instant molecular orientation microscopy for the life sciences. bioRxiv 2023.02.07.527479 (Feb 2023), doi: https://doi.org/10.1101/2023.02.07.527479","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":133,"length":41}],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"00B9467B0E1911EFA8B90A58A9FEAC02","url":"https://doi.org/10.1101/2023.02.07.527479"}}}}
steps: J8 LFA-1 cells were incubated overnight (approximately 18:00:00 ) in complete-RPMI (StableCell RPMI-1640 media, Sigma) supplemented with 10 % (v/v) fetal calf serum (FCS), 1 % (v/v) HEPES buffer, and 1 % (v/v) pen/strep antibiotics.
1 mL of cells were collected by centrifugation and resuspended in phenol-red free RPMI supplemented with 1 % HEPES.
Round coverslips were rinsed with IPA, MilliQ, dried, and Ar-plasma cleaned for 00:20:00 .
Grace Bio-Labs CultureWells were attached, and the slide was incubated with OKT3 antibody (provided by the Human Immunology Unit, WIMM, Oxford) for 00:30:00 .
The slide was washed 5 times with phenol-red free RPMI supplemented with 1 % HEPES.
Perform a final wash with phenol-red free RPMI supplemented with 1 % HEPES and 200 nM NR4A (MemGlow‱ NR4A Membrane Polarity Probe, Cat. #MG06, Cytoskeleton Inc.) before imaging.
creator: Ezra Bruggeman
